recommendations.title: Flodder
recommendations.overview: A low-class antisocial family ends up in a rich upper-class neighborhood and causes all sorts of trouble.

recommendations.title: Picture Perfect
recommendations.overview: A young advertising executive's life becomes increasingly complicated when, in order to impress her boss, she pretends to be engaged to a man she has just met.

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.

recommendations.title: Labor Pains
recommendations.overview: A young woman pretends to be pregnant in order to avoid being fired from her job. When that gets her a bunch of special treatment by everyone involved in her life, she tries to keep up the lie for nine months.

recommendations.title: Soap and Water
recommendations.overview: A school janitor pretends to be a priest in order to give private lessons to a young top model.

recommendations.title: Borgman
recommendations.overview: An enigmatic vagrant cons himself into the home life of an arrogant upper-class family, turning their lives into a psychological nightmare in the process.

recommendations.title: The Idle Class
recommendations.overview: At an upper class golf resort, a tramp discovers he's the lookalike of a rich man with a beautiful, unhappy wife.

recommendations.title: Asuran
recommendations.overview: A family from the underprivileged class is on the run after the teenaged son kills a rich man from the upper caste. Can the pacifist father be able to save his hot-blooded son?

recommendations.title: The Stroller Strategy
recommendations.overview: When Thomas Platz is suddenly made the guardian of a baby - then pretends to be its real father in order to win back Marie, the girlfriend who dumped him a year before. Stuck between staying a man-child forever, and proving he is ready to take the ne

recommendations.title: Stung
recommendations.overview: A fancy garden party turns into upper class prey when a colony of killer wasps mutates into seven foot tall predators.
